title: 90-Day Strategic Plan Canvas
description: A single-page canvas for capturing your 3 quarterly priorities, measurable outcomes, and monthly milestones.

sections.title: Current Position
sections.description: Where you are right now — key numbers and honest assessment

sections.title: Priority 1
sections.description: Your most important focus area for the next 90 days

sections.title: Priority 2
sections.description: Your second most important focus area

sections.title: Weekly Review
fields: What did I commit to this week?
What do I commit to next week?

howToUse: Fill in the Current Position section first. Then define each priority with a measurable 90-day outcome and monthly milestones. Print this page and review it every Friday.
